name: okf-wiki
description: Generate source-grounded Markdown Wikis from local Git repositories (Pi agent harness + local Web UI).

scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check && pnpm run check:architecture
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:libs && pnpm run dev:stack
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n contract,core,agent,server,web -c blue,cyan,magenta,green,yellow "pnpm --filter @okf-wiki/contract dev" "pnpm --filter @okf-wiki/core dev" "pnpm --filter @okf-wiki/agent dev" "pnpm --filter @okf-wiki/server dev" "pnpm --filter @okf-wiki/web dev"
